ExploratorySummarizedExperiment-class
The ExploratorySummarizedExperiment class
ExploratorySummarizedExperiment()

The server function of the chipseq module. Currently a near-clone of the RNA-seq module, with ChIP-seq optimisations planned.

The input function of the chipseq module. Currently a near-clone of the RNA-seq module, with ChIP-seq optimisations planned.

Choose a valid set of grouping variables from a targets/ experiment data frame.

evaluateCardinalFilter()
Evaluate a vector of values with respect to a limit and a cardinality, being '>', '<' , '> or <-' (e.g. a fold change above a limit in + or - directions), or '< and >-' (not a above a limit in + or -).
